CREATE TABLE test_dates (id Int32, date_time DateTime, date_time_string String);
SELECT subtractMilliseconds(date_time, 1000) AS subtract_1_second FROM test_dates WHERE id = 1;
SELECT subtractMilliseconds(date_time_string, 5000) AS subtract_5_seconds FROM test_dates WHERE id = 1;

WITH toDateTime('2023-12-31 23:59:59') AS edge_time, '2023-12-31 23:59:59' AS edge_time_string SELECT subtractMilliseconds(edge_time, 60000) AS subtract_1_minute, subtractMilliseconds(edge_time_string, 60000) AS subtract_1_minute_string;
WITH (SELECT date_time FROM test_dates WHERE id = 1) AS dt, 2000 AS ms_subtract SELECT subtractMilliseconds(dt, ms_subtract) AS subtract_2_seconds FROM test_dates;
WITH (SELECT date_time_string FROM test_dates WHERE id = 1) AS dt_string, 15000 AS ms_subtract SELECT subtractMilliseconds(dt_string, ms_subtract) AS subtract_15_seconds_string FROM test_dates;
SELECT subtractMilliseconds(event_time, 180000) AS subtract_3_minutes FROM another_test;
WITH (SELECT date_time FROM test_dates) AS dt SELECT subtractMilliseconds(dt, 100) AS subtract_100_milliseconds FROM test_dates;
SELECT A.id, A.date_time, B.subtract_milliseconds FROM test_dates AS A JOIN (SELECT id, subtractMilliseconds(date_time, 7200000) AS subtract_2_hours FROM test_dates) AS B ON A.id = B.id;
